modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty scheduling an appointment with an academic advisor.

full_description_text:  
The user is trying to set up a meeting with their academic advisor. They are unsure of the steps to take. This is causing some confusion and frustration. They need guidance on how to proceed with scheduling.
short_description: Difficulty scheduling an appointment with an academic advisor.
